name: Development feature: category filters and drag assignment
description: Create a categorized event, verify category color/filter behavior, drag it to another category, verify persistence, and clean it up.

planSteps.description: Type demo@timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field
Click the Sign In button and wait for the dashboard weekly calendar to load
Click + Add Event once to open a new event dialog
Type TS Development Category Event into the event title field and choose a late free time in the currently displayed week
Select Focus in the Kategori field
Click Simpan Event and wait for the calendar to refresh
Verify TS Development Category Event appears in the calendar and its edit dialog persists Kategori as Focus
Click the Focus category filter chip to disable it
Verify TS Development Category Event is hidden from the weekly calendar while the Focus filter is disabled; Today Agenda may remain unfiltered
Click the Focus category filter chip again and wait for the event to reappear
Drag the TS Development Category Event block onto the Personal category filter chip and wait for the update
Verify the event remains visible with Personal category styling
Click TS Development Category Event to open its edit dialog
Verify the Kategori field is set to Personal, proving the drag assignment persisted
Click Hapus and confirm the browser deletion prompt
Verify the deleted-event undo banner appears, confirming cleanup
